PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HURTADO, RALPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNA, VANESSA MARIE BARRET $15,100.20 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,100.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, DATED MAR-05-2012.
